subject: [Pre-read] Reg CB LFF/ CNLS/ Projects Monthly Update - Nov 2025
deck_filename: Reg CB LFF_CNLS_Projects Monthly Catchup - Nov_vf.pdf

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Please find attached slides for our discussion tomorrow, let me know for
any questions.

Thank you.

-- 
*Jason YU*
*Regional CB | MY & SG CB*
*Mobile*: +65 90284825
*Email*: jason.yu@shopee.com

content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 6

   - Can remind me what was the target for VN before TET?

Will we be able
   to reach TT 40% by then?

Slide 7

   - Where did we land on tightening policy of fake 3PF in the end?

Slide 9

   - For MY and PH, is it possible for FBS  > 3PF?

Feels like FBS can still
   afford to be bigger



Slide 10

   - When will PH fix their WH issue?

Slide 12

   - How are we managing this process in CN right now?

For those sellers in
   our FBS WH, we go seller by seller and attempt to increase their ADO %
   every month?

We look at the SKU mix, ATP % and push them to put more in
   local WH over time?

And then we track seller lens to ensure growth is both
   by new sellers as existing sellers doing more



Slide 13 -14

   - What does this all site RVP mean?

Slide 20

   - Is there a view on cost to seller?

And for SLS, there is also cost for
   seller to pick/pack/store
   - And from a pricing point of view, how will we charge seller?

- We have to go back to why we are doing this
      - It is cheaper for seller to do this
      - It is more profitable for Shopee to do this (including cost savings
      + increase in PC2 difference)
      - Or it is less profitable but it will help buyer experience
   - All the above is still not very clear right now



Slide 26

   - Why will we offer this at true cost to sellers?

We need to make money
   from the businesses that we do for CB..
   - And do we include sellers WH and pick/pack cost?

Others

   - Overall, the flow is not easy to understand and do not think we
   thought this properly through..
   - Still struggle to see the overall P&L impact to the CB business and
   why we want to do this



Slide 31

   - What is Anbo SLS?
- For TH, we should just pitch in advance?

If they go to 3PF, it is hard
   to get them back?
- When do we intend to conclude WIP pitching?

Slide 40

   - For CNLS, do we also pitch SG/MY together?

I guess if they can sell to
   MY, they can also sell to SG



Slide 46

   - Shall we use Taobao program incentives?

Think that is quite aligned
   across all markets?

Too many programs are not good in general
   - But overall, we should definitely align the packages if not very hard
   to pitch. Especially the packages of the key import markets



Slide 60 – 68

   - For this, can coordinate with RBP side, they just did a round of clean
   up. Not sure we should be overly generous just to increase Mall % for the
   sake of



Slide 80

   - Ok. But we need to improve the multiples of the existing categories?

For eg. Fashion and F&B seems to be going down as compared to increasing..



Slide 90

   - For Lever 2, how do we ensure that these are indeed TB SKUs?

And not
   just making the number look good?
- For Lever 3, where did we land on OF?

Slide 96

   - We will always have 2 views. Platform NPC and S2S NPC..
   - What is contribution of seed shops to CB business?

Want to understand
   the impact















*From:* Ian Ho <hoi@sea.com>
*Sent:* Tuesday, 11 November 2025 1:15 pm
*To:* 'Jason Yu' <jason.yu@shopee.com>; 'Jianghong Liu' <
jianghong.liu@shopee.com>; 'Keljin Chua' <keljin.chua@shopee.com>; 'Shuning
Wang' <shuning.wang@shopee.com>; 'Cheng Derek' <derek.cheng@shopee.com>;
'Elaine Wang' <elaine.wang@shopee.com>; 'Bufei Liu' <bufei.liu@shopee.com>;
'Yuna Kwon' <yuna.kwon@shopee.com>; 'Joanne Lee' <joanne.lee@shopee.com>;
'Ray Wang' <ray.wang01@shopee.com>; 'Lu Lin' <lu.lin@shopee.com>; 'Angela
Hsu Yi-Han' <angela.hsu@shopee.com>; 'Max Goh Shi Long' <
max.gohsl@shopee.com>; 'Wong Si Ying' <siying.wong@shopee.com>
*Subject:* RE: [Pre-read] Reg CB LFF/ CNLS/ Projects Monthly Update - Nov
2025



Thanks.

Hi all,

Please find follow up from meeting as below

No. Topic Action Items PIC DDL
1 CB Program Consolidation Consolidate CB programs across different
business units and multiple sellers (KR/JP/CN) Jason 21 Nov
2 Anbo Warehouse Reorganize flow of presentation and accentuate value
proposition for Anbo Warehouse across 3 POV (Buyer, Seller, Shopee)
- Buyer: Better BWT
- Seller: Lower cost of doing business vs SLS, FBS experience without FBS
hassle
- Shopee: Increase in FBS% penetration and impact to overall CB PnL Jason 21
Nov
